ItacAcademyItem.Name: Risoluti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: There is uncertainty about the emblem of the Academy. Members of the Risoluti merged into the Intronati Academy in 1603.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
